title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.434 - St. Louis regional taxicab district laws inapplicable to TNCs, drivers, and services
text:
387.434.  St. Louis regional taxicab district laws inapplicable to TNCs, drivers, and services. — Notwithstanding any other provision of law, sections 67.1800 to 67.1822 shall not apply to transportation network companies, transportation network drivers, or transportation network services.
(L. 2017 H.B. 130)
